MerchantHome.title: EP Merchant
MerchantHome.subtitle: After login, manage verification, services, and live order intake.

MerchantAuth.loginDesc: Open the merchant console, with verification and service publishing handled separately.
MerchantAuth.registerDesc: Register with email and go straight to the merchant console.

MerchantOnboarding.title: Onboarding Details
MerchantOnboarding.desc: Complete identity and service profile before going live.
MerchantOnboarding.invalidPricingOrCategory: Please provide valid service type, pricing and radius
MerchantOnboarding.reviewPendingLock: Your documents are under review. Editing is temporarily disabled.
MerchantOnboarding.reviewApprovedLock: Review passed. Onboarding documents are now locked.
MerchantOnboarding.reviewRejectedEditable: Review was rejected. You can update and resubmit.
MerchantOnboarding.lockedCannotSubmit: Current review status does not allow resubmission

MerchantStatus.title: Review Status
MerchantStatus.desc: Status updates are synced with platform processing.
MerchantStatus.pendingDesc: Identity and service credentials are under verification.
MerchantStatus.unsubmittedDesc: You have not submitted verification yet. Open Profile to submit it separately.
MerchantStatus.approvedDesc: Review passed. You can now manage your merchant operations.
MerchantStatus.rejectedDesc: Some documents need updates. Please revise and resubmit.

MerchantDashboard.title: Merchant Operations Overview
MerchantDashboard.subtitle: Verification, service publishing, and order handling are managed as separate flows.
MerchantDashboard.identityDesc: Identity verification is approved and profile details can still be maintained.
MerchantDashboard.identityPendingDesc: Identity verification is under review and will sync automatically.
MerchantDashboard.identityUnsubmittedDesc: You have not submitted identity verification yet. You can submit it from Profile.
MerchantDashboard.identityRejectedDesc: Verification was rejected. Please update it from Profile and resubmit.
MerchantDashboard.serviceDesc: Manage service groups, SKU pricing, visibility, publishing and promotion from one place.
MerchantDashboard.onlineOrderDesc: Your account is live and receiving new service requests.
MerchantDashboard.onlineOrderEmptyDesc: There are no orders yet. This section will update automatically when real orders arrive.

MerchantOrders.title: Live Order Management
MerchantOrders.subtitle: Manage orders by status and update progress quickly.

MerchantServices.title: Published Services
MerchantServices.subtitle: Show current published services as cards. Create and edit actions go to a detail page.
MerchantServices.catalogDesc: The list page only shows published service cards. Creating a service adds a new card, while editing happens in the detail page.
MerchantServices.serviceTypesDesc: After registration, bind the service types you provide first. When creating products later, the system will load matching templates and form fields for the selected types.
MerchantServices.emptyPublished: No published services yet. Create one to show a new card here.
MerchantServices.editorSubtitle: Edit basic info, SKU pricing, merchandising status and gallery assets.
MerchantServices.detailSubtitle: This is the service detail page for both creating and editing.
MerchantServices.computedRange: Auto computed range: min ฿ {min}, max ฿ {max}
MerchantServices.invalidServiceForm: Please provide service name, category, and workflow template. When editing a service, include at least one valid price.
MerchantServices.dynamicFormDesc: These fields come from the backend based on the selected service type and template, including backend default values.
MerchantServices.templatePricingDesc: After selecting a pricing mode, the quote inputs will render immediately from backend template price items and defaults.
MerchantServices.skuHint: Price different vehicle types, scenarios, or packages separately
MerchantServices.galleryHint: Front-end structure is ready. Real media persistence will follow backend media APIs.

MerchantWallet.title: Account & Wallet
MerchantWallet.subtitle: Track balance, income records, and withdrawals.

MerchantProfile.title: Profile, Verification & Live Status
MerchantProfile.subtitle: Basic profile, identity verification, and service publishing are handled separately.
MerchantProfile.verificationDesc: Submit verification here separately. It no longer shares the same API with service publishing.
MerchantProfile.verificationSubmitted: Verification submitted and waiting for review.
MerchantProfile.verificationPendingHint: Verification is under review and cannot be resubmitted for now.
MerchantProfile.verificationApprovedHint: Verification already passed. No need to submit again.
MerchantProfile.serviceCenterDesc: Service products, pricing and visibility are managed in Service Center, fully separate from verification.
MerchantProfile.languageSaved: Language preference is bound to your account
